FREE TRADER Though interstellar cartels dominate shipping and trade in the thirty-first century; the independent free trader is nonethe less common sight across the Inner Sphere especially in war-torn or remote areas where larger corporations are reluc tant to operate_ In these regions resourceful person can make serious profit, Tlme: years Attribute Minlmums: CHA Skllls: Zero G Operations +1 Appraisal +2, Negotiation +2, choose one; Fast Talk +2, Interest/ Any +2, Protocol /Any +2, Scrounge +1_ Language Any Next Path: Ne'er-Do-Well (4), Civilian Job (4), Free Trader (4 only if character has the Wealth Trait; takes money t0 make money)
COVERT Ops Your nation summons YOU to perform well beyond the call of duty: You will earn significant rewards if you survive The player determines the specific duty covered by this path, rang ing from sabotage ad infiltration to assassination ad fomenting rebellion.
